findings.message: Unity MCP confirmed Assets/Scenes/Stage1.unity is the enabled Build Settings scene before the build.
Unity MCP script validation reported zero diagnostics for BuildScript.cs before the build.
Escape From Nightmares/Build Windows Player was invoked through Unity MCP.
Build output includes EscapeFromNightmares_Data, UnityPlayer.dll, UnityCrashHandler64.exe, MonoBleedingEdge, and D3D12.
Generated build folder contains 39 files totaling 108299253 bytes.

Unity MCP timed out while waiting for the menu command response and while reading the console after the build, so the build was verified from generated output files instead of a final Unity console success line.
Generated Windows player launch/playthrough smoke validation has not been run yet.

followups: Run or automate a generated-player smoke validation.
Add concrete Stage1 PlayMode smoke tests for start, HUD, room movement, interaction, game-over restart, and stage clear conditions.
Perform final playtest tuning for hit areas, map markers, and monster/hiding balance.
